name: Best Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the broccoli into florets with small stems, then peel the main stalk and slice it into strips.
2. Crush the garlic partially using the flat side of a knife.
3. Fill a large pot with water and add all ingredients, ensuring that the broccoli stems are submerged.
4. Cook, covered, until the broccoli is tender.
5. Drain and refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
